title: QIAprep Spin Miniprep – Plasmid DNA Purification
author: QIAGEN

steps.title: Grow E. coli Culture
steps.instruction: Grow 1.5 mL of overnight E. coli culture (LB broth + appropriate antibiotic) to OD600 ~1.5.

steps.title: Pellet Bacteria
steps.instruction: Pellet bacteria by centrifugation at 8000 rpm for 3 minutes. Discard supernatant completely.

steps.title: Resuspend Pellet
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in 250 µL Buffer P1 (contains RNase A). Vortex until fully homogeneous — no cell clumps.

steps.title: Lyse Cells
steps.instruction: Add 250 µL Buffer P2 (lysis buffer). Mix gently by inverting the tube 4–6 times. Do NOT vortex. Incubate at room temperature for 2 minutes maximum — prolonged lysis damages chromosomal DNA.

steps.title: Neutralize Lysis
steps.instruction: Add 350 µL Buffer N3 (neutralisation buffer). Mix immediately by inverting 4–6 times. A white precipitate will form — this contains chromosomal DNA, proteins, and SDS.

steps.title: Centrifuge and Transfer Supernatant
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13,000 rpm for 10 minutes at room temperature. Transfer clear supernatant to QIAprep spin column.

steps.title: Bind DNA to Column
steps.instruction: Centrifuge column at 13,000 rpm for 1 minute. Discard flow-through.

steps.title: Wash Column with Buffer PB
steps.instruction: Wash column with 500 µL Buffer PB. Centrifuge 1 minute. Discard flow-through.

steps.title: Wash Column with Buffer PE and Dry Spin
steps.instruction: Wash with 750 µL Buffer PE. Centrifuge 1 minute. Discard flow-through. Centrifuge again for 1 minute (dry spin) to remove residual ethanol.

steps.title: Elute DNA
steps.instruction: Elute DNA with 50 µL Buffer EB (10 mM Tris-Cl, pH 8.5) pre-warmed to 70°C. Let stand 1 minute. Centrifuge 1 minute. Collect eluate.

steps.title: Quantify DNA
steps.instruction: Quantify DNA by NanoDrop at A260/280 — expect ratio 1.8–2.0 for pure DNA.
